title: Looking to hire someone to help with creating an order checklist

posts.author: iAirServices (Sean Sykora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Each of our jobs have a different list of materials needed.
We want to be able to create a form that we can give to our warehouse specialist to pull.
Once the order is pulled from our inventory whatever is left is ordered and picked up from supplier. I would like that list of what is not in inventory to get emailed to supplier and our warehouse manager will have that list to use as a checklist for when he picks up at supplier to ensure all was picked up.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sean,

I’d happily help out. I think the best thing would be to book in a discovery session for 30 minutes or so in order to identify the problem clearly and consider a potential solution together.

Please feel free to contact me via email (flyingravendesign@gmail.com)

Francis

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @iAirServices!

With monday.com, you can build and use custom forms to gather, track, and evaluate data. The forms created using WorkForms module can be integrated with your existing inventory software, while automatically syncing with monday.com workflows and boards. Through the several permissions and settings, you can decide how your forms are accessed and viewed by suppliers. Some of the permissions include the form restrictions, submission view, personalizing the screen, and the sync between responses.

Building custom forms is even more easier with the support of skilled monday.com consultants. They can construct personalized forms and easily embed the link or share them with via supplier tools.
